title: Here is why Strategy's dividend-paying crypto stock is crashing to near-historic lows
summary: Strategy's bitcoin-backed preferred stock remains well below par value as concerns over dividend coverage and stronger competition from Strive's SATA.

title: Bitcoin miners' AI pivot faces $50 billion reality check, says VanEck

title: U.S. senators urge Treasury not to leave states out of GENIUS Act stablecoin process
summary: Senators led by Republican Cynthia Lummis are insisting the Treasury Department ensure states get a process to prove their ability to supervise stablecoins.

title: Coinbase intoduces AI advisor, stock options, and pre-IPO markets in finance push
summary: The crypto exchange is expanding into investing, derivatives and banking services as it pursues an all-in-one financial platform.
